debug_info.goal:
u : Scalar52
h : u ≠ ZERO
⊢ ∃ m, u.as_montgomery = ok m ∧ Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] ∧ m ≠ ZERO

failed_attempts: simpa [as_montgomery] using Scalar52.as_montgomery.spec u h

rcases Scalar52.as_montgomery.spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod, hne⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using hmod
  · exact hne h
simpa [as_montgomery] using (Scalar52.AsMontgomery.spec u h)

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hmod, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [hm0] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO) (n := L))
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      exact (Nat.ModEq.trans (Nat.ModEq.symm hmod) this)
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      exact cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using this)
    simpa using this
  have : u = ZERO := by
    exact Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff.mp hu0
  exact h this

rcases (as_montgomery.spec u) with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hmod, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [hm0] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat m))
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using (hmod.trans this)
    exact cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using this)
  have : u = ZERO := by
    apply Scalar52.ext
    simpa using (Scalar52_as_Nat.inj_modL_zero hu0)
  exact h this

rcases Scalar52.as_montgomery.spec u with ⟨m, hm⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm.1, hm.2.1, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [hm0] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO) : Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO [MOD L])
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      simpa [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using (hm.2.1.trans this)
    have := cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using this)
    simpa using this
  have : u = ZERO := by
    exact Scalar52_as_Nat.eq_zero_iff.mp hu0
  exact h this

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using hmod
  · intro hm0
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by
      simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] using congrArg Scalar52_as_Nat hm0
    have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := by
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
        simpa [this] using (Nat.ModEq.trans (by simpa [this] using (Nat.ModEq.symm (by
          simpa [Nat.zero_mul] using (Nat.ModEq.refl 0)))) (by
          simpa [Nat.zero_mul] using (Nat.ModEq.refl 0)))
      have huR : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
        simpa [this] using (Nat.ModEq.trans (by simpa [this] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R))) (by
          simpa [Nat.zero_mul] using (Nat.ModEq.refl 0)))
      have huR' : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by
        simpa using huR
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) huR'
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat u < L := Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u
      have : 0 < L := by
        unfold L
        decide
      exact Nat.eq_of_lt_of_modEq this (by simpa using this) (by simpa using this)
    have : u = ZERO := by
      apply Scalar52.ext
      simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] using hu0
    exact h this

classical
  simpa [as_montgomery] using Scalar52.as_montgomery.spec u h
simpa [as_montgomery] using as_montgomery_spec u h

classical
  rcases Scalar52.as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hmod, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by
    simpa [ZERO] using congrArg Scalar52_as_Nat hm0
  have huR0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    simpa [this] using hmod
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    exact cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using huR0)
  have hu : u = ZERO := by
    exact Scalar52.eq_zero_of_as_Nat_modEq_zero hu0
  exact h hu

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using hmod
  · intro hm0
    apply h
    have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := by
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [hm0] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat m))
      have hmnat0 : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] := by
        simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using hmod
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hmnat0.trans this
      have hcoprime : Nat.Coprime R L := by
        unfold R L Nat.Coprime
        simp
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] :=
        (Nat.ModEq.cancel_right_of_coprime (Nat.Coprime.symm hcoprime) (by simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using this))
      exact Nat.eq_zero_of_modEq_zero this
    exact (Scalar52.eq_zero_iff_as_Nat_eq_zero.mp hu0).symm
simpa using Scalar52.as_montgomery_spec (u := u) h

classical
  refine ⟨_, rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa [as_montgomery]
  · simpa [as_montgomery] using h

rcases Scalar52.as_montgomery.spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hmod, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by
    simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat] using congrArg Scalar52_as_Nat hm0
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have hm0' : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [this]
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      exact (Nat.ModEq.trans (Nat.ModEq.symm hmod) hm0')
    exact cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) this
  have : u = ZERO := by
    exact (Scalar52.eq_zero_iff_asNat_eq_zero u).2 hu0
  exact h this

classical
  refine ⟨_, rfl, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simpa using (Scalar52_as_Nat_as_montgomery (u := u))
  · intro hm
    have hu : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      have hm' : Scalar52_as_Nat (as_montgomery u).val ≡ (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R) [MOD L] := by
        simpa using (Scalar52_as_Nat_as_montgomery (u := u))
      have : (Scalar52_as_Nat u * R) ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [hm] using hm'
      have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using this)
      simpa using this
    have hz : u = ZERO := by
      exact Scalar52.eq_of_asNat_modEq_zero hu
    exact h hz

rcases Scalar52.as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hcongr⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hcongr, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat] using congrArg Scalar52_as_Nat hm0
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      simpa [this] using (hcongr.trans (by simpa [this] : 0 ≡ 0 [MOD L]))
    have hR : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
    have hR' : Nat.Coprime R L := Nat.Coprime.symm hR
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      exact Nat.ModEq.cancel_right_of_coprime hR' (by simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using this)
    exact Nat.ModEq.eq_of_lt_of_lt this (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u) (by simpa using (Nat.zero_lt_of_ne_zero (by
      intro hL0; cases Nat.lt_irrefl 0 (by simpa [hL0] using L_pos))))
  have : u = ZERO := by
    apply Scalar52.eq_of_as_Nat_eq
    simpa [hu0] 
  exact h this

rcases Scalar52.as_montgomery.spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hmod, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    simpa [hm0, ZERO] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat (ZERO : Scalar52)) (n := L))
  have huR : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    exact hmod.trans this
  have hu : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using huR)
  have : u = ZERO := by
    exact (Scalar52.eq_ZERO_iff_asNat_modEq_zero u).2 hu
  exact h (this)

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm, hmod⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm, hmod, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by
    simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat, hm0] using (rfl : Scalar52_as_Nat m = Scalar52_as_Nat ZERO)
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := by
    have hmod' : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      simpa [this] using hmod
    have hRcop : Nat.Coprime R L := by
      unfold R L Nat.Coprime
      simp
    have hRcop' := Nat.Coprime.symm hRcop
    have := Nat.ModEq.cancel_right_of_coprime hRcop' hmod'
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
      simpa [Nat.mul_zero] using this
    have hlt : Scalar52_as_Nat u < L := by
      simpa [L] using (Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u)
    exact Nat.eq_of_lt_of_modEq hlt (by simpa using this)
  have : u = ZERO := by
    exact Scalar52.ext (by simpa using hu0)
  exact h this
simpa [as_montgomery] using as_montgomery_spec (u := u) h

    have : u = ZERO := by

rcases as_montgomery_spec u with ⟨m, hm⟩
  refine ⟨m, hm.1, hm.2.1, ?_⟩
  intro hm0
  have hu0 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [hm0] using (Nat.ModEq.refl (Scalar52_as_Nat m) : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat m [MOD L])
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by simpa [Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using (hm.2.1.trans this)
    exact cancelR (a := Scalar52_as_Nat u) (b := 0) (by simpa using this)
  have : u = ZERO := by
    exact Scalar52.ext (by
      simpa [Scalar52_as_Nat_ZERO] using hu0)
  exact h this
